conclusion.reason: Deterministic evidence gate selected a stronger supported competing hypothesis.

effective_conclusion.reason: Deterministic evidence gate selected a stronger supported competing hypothesis.

requested_conclusion.reason: Increased descriptor ceiling did not resolve the issue.
